verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a source in time of needs That gives me hope, that brings me peace In every trial, through every test My saviour stands in my defence (Hallelujah)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So When The Road You Walk Leaves You Tired And Worn All Your Strength Is gone And Your Heart Feels Torn Remember God Is greater Than the Storm Take Courage For the battle is the Lords.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And When The Waters Rise He Calls My Name And bids me come Out On The Wave, He Holds My Hand Lest I should I falter, And Makes Me Stand Out On The Water
